title: BlackSky Technology Inc (BKSY) Q4 2024: Everything You Need To Know Ahead Of Earnings
text: Earnings Release Date: March 6, 2025. Q4 2024 Estimates: Revenue consensus: $34.22 million, Earnings per share: -$0.31. Full Year 2024 Projections: Revenue: $105.95 million, Earnings: -$2.34 per share. 2025 Outlook: Revenue estimates have modestly increased to $133.65 million for 2025, while earnings are projected at -$1.31 per share, showing expected improvement in profitability trajectory. In Q3 2024, the company missed analyst expectations significantly. Actual revenue was $22.55 million, which missed analysts' revenue expectations of $27.48 million by -17.94%. Despite this underperformance, stock price climbed 1.06% following the announcement. Analyst Perspective: Six analysts offer price targets averaging $17.33, suggesting 37% upside potential. The company maintains an "Outperform" consensus rating with a 1.8 average recommendation score.
